## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] Repository-facing documentation affected by this change is updated in English
- [ ] Validation workflows are green
- [ ] Render, deployment, or infrastructure validation checks are green where applicable
- [ ] Required CI workflows remain blocking, not advisory
- [ ] Changes to staging or production rollout behavior are documented explicitly
- [ ] Affected runtime repositories or environments are listed when deployment policy changed

## Notes

- Link rollout implications, environment scope, or operational follow-up here.
